description:
DeepSeek v4 is out! The new model has excellent performance and is highly efficient for long-context processing. Let's learn the core idea of the new compressed attention (CSA and HCA)!

00:00 DeepSeek v4
00:22 Attention review
02:00 Multi-head attention
03:43 Reducing KV cache (MQA/GQA/MLA)
05:16 Token-level compression
10:04 Compressed attention
12:52 Sparse attention (DSA)
13:32 Compressed Sparse Attention (CSA) and Heavily Compressed Attention (HCA)
15:35 DeepSeek V4 Pro architecture with CSA/HCA

Reference: 
- [DeepSeek v4] https://huggingface.co/deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V4-Pro

Other components in DeepSeek V4
- Muon optimizer: https://youtu.be/bO5nvE289ec
- Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections (mHC): https://youtu.be/jYn_1PpRzxI
- Mixture of Experts (MoE): https://youtu.be/0QQlYR1r6pQ
- DeepSeek Sparse Attention (DSA): https://youtu.be/Y-o545eYjXM

Video made with manim https://www.manim.community/
